container.title: Part C. Studio practices
Collaborative design
container.description:
For this specialisation, you must complete 48 credit points, with at least 36 credit points (three units) from the following list.

Note 1: You must complete Studio 4 and Studio 5 units in your chosen specialisation.
Note 2: You may replace either the Studio 2 or Studio 3 unit below with the equivalent unit from an alternative specialisation.
Note 3: You may replace either the Studio 4 or Studio 5 unit below with the Global design studio unit (DGN3000). Refer to the Global design studio for more information on eligibility.

container.title: Global design studio
container.description:
Global design studio (DGN3000) can be used to replace Studio 4 (COL3001/CDS3001/IDN3001/SDN3001) or Studio 5 (COL3002/CDS3002/IDN3002/SDN3002) in your chosen specialisation.

DGN3000 is only offered in Prato (Italy) and enrolment is via application and approval only.

container.title: Course rules
container.description:
The course comprises 144 credit points, of which 96 credit points are focussed on the study of design and 48 credit points are free electives. Elective units may be at any level, however, no more than 60 credit points are to be completed at Level 1 in the Bachelor of Design.

You must complete 144 credit points comprising:
- 96 credit points of study from your chosen specialisation, either Collaborative design, Communication design, Industrial design or Spatial design ; and
- 48 credit points of free electives.

You must ensure that you complete no more than 10 units (60 credit points) at Level 1 and at least 24 credit points at Level 3 or higher.

container.title: Part D. Free electives
container.description:
Deepen your knowledge by selecting electives from the Faculty of Art, Design and Architecture, including gaining workplace experience by selecting an internship unit as an elective and enriching your degree by using free electives for Monash Abroad opportunities: https://www.monash.edu/mada/current-students/course-information/electives.

Alternatively, you may choose to select electives from across the University (provided you satisfy the unit rules) to broaden your interdisciplinary perspectives.

container.title: Part E. Indonesian studies - For the Indonesia offering only
container.description:
You must complete the following unit.

Note: the workload requirements (including contact hours) for each of these subjects is 2 hours per week. These units must be undertaking in parallel with your other units and cannot be completed outside Indonesia.
